title: Day 4 Lesson 3 ( Video )Talking about homework
html:
Day 4 - Lesson 3

しゅくだいの　はなしを　する = Talking about homework

ばしょ (Location): きょうしつ　= Classroom

とうじょうじんぶつ (Characters): がくせい ふたり (two students)

The new words for this lesson are:

いつも (itsumo) = always/usually

どこ で (doko de) = where

しゅくだい (shukudai) = homework

としょかん (toshokan) = library

ときどき (tokidoki) = sometimes

きっさてん (kissaten) = coffee shop

うち (uchi) = home
